Contact Me
==========

I love hearing from readers, hiring teams, and collaborators. If you have a question about an article, need help with a data/AI topic, or want to discuss a writing or consulting opportunity, send a message.

What to include
---------------

*   Your goal or question
*   Relevant links (article, repo, profile, or company page)
*   Any timeline or priority

The more context you share, the faster I can give a useful response.

Send a message
--------------

Your name  Your email  Subject  Your message Send Message
